title: Luminaria
description: A Vanilla Mod-Pack That is Flexible Yet Visually Stunning.
body:
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41cb440325bedd82db8aebcd70f5ed3bd942d99f_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/TqBqKv99Ch)

Vanilla modpack focused on every little thing that can be improved, from visuals to utility, this modpack is meant to be a visual base for you to add your own game-changing mods, as this modpack is vanilla generation.

![Lagoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48c17f8c065a26072f03c01593f31ad5eb3db8b1.png) # Modpack Features - Custom Music - Water Effects (wakes + visuality) - First Person View Model - Custom Animations - Custom Player Animations - Pre-Installed Shaders - Utility Mods - Building Mods - Super Better Grass ([dimadencep](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dimadencep/projects)) - _More found below_
